name: Time Saving Italian Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350° F.
2. Shake the flour in the Reynolds Oven Bag and place it in a 13x9x2 baking pan.
3. Add the spaghetti sauce to the oven bag.
4. Squeeze the oven bag to blend the flour with the sauce.
5. Add the chicken and green pepper to the oven bag.
6. Close the oven bag with nylon tie, cutting six 1/2-inch slits in the top.
7. Bake until the chicken is tender, about 25 to 30 minutes.
8. Serve over hot spaghetti.
